info.name: Absentra Leave Management System
info.description: Complete API testing collection for Absentra Backend - Includes authentication, leaves, users, admin, and reports

exec: // Pre-request script to set timestamps for leave dates
console.log('✅ Admin registered with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log('✅ Admin logged in, token saved');
console.log('✅ Manager registered with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log('✅ Manager logged in, token saved');
console.log('✅ Employee registered with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log('✅ Female Employee registered with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log('✅ Employee logged in, token saved');
console.log('✅ Password reset email sent (if configured)');
console.log('✅ Leave applied with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log('✅ Half-day sick leave applied with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log('✅ Earned leave applied with ID:', jsonData.data._id);
console.log(`✅ Found ${jsonData.data.length} pending leaves in team`);
console.log(`✅ Team summary retrieved for ${jsonData.data.length} employees`);
console.log('✅ Leave balance reset for new year');
